incident_summary: New analyst OP-9201 in QC laboratory performed HPLC analysis of batch C6291B using incorrect integration method — not trained on current version of Atlas software.
root_cause_detail: Software was upgraded 3 weeks prior to analyst joining. Onboarding training plan used previous software version content — update not identified before analyst commenced work.
corrective_action: All affected results invalidated and repeated by trained analyst. Analyst {op()} provided targeted software training and competency assessment before returning to routine analysis.
preventive_action: Onboarding training plan version-controlled and updated on same day as any system upgrade. New analysts cannot access analytical systems in EBR until training completion confirmed in LIMS.
effectiveness_check: Zero training-gap-related analytical errors for 12 months. 100% new analyst training plan currency compliance on monthly HR audit.
